title: Tangy Chewy Peruvian Shrimp Noodles
description: A lazy Sunday Peruvian dish featuring rice vermicelli, succulent shrimp, and a tangy sauce, perfect for a relaxing meal. This pescatarian-friendly recipe combines the flavors of Peru with the comfort of chewy noodles.
instructions: Cook the rice vermicelli according to package instructions and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine aji amarillo peppers, lime juice, garlic, and soy sauce. Blend until smooth.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add the blended sauce to the skillet and stir to combine. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to combine with the sauce and shrimp.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
Serve with additional lime wedges on the side, if desired.
